ddls:
CREATE TABLE "representatives" (
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each representative */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the representative */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the representative */,
  "state_district" TEXT /* State and district represented */,
  "term_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the representative's term started */,
  "term_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the representative's term is expected to end */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the representative */,
  "website" TEXT /* The representative's official website */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* The representative's Twitter handle */,
  "facebook_page" TEXT /* The representative's Facebook page */,
  "linkedin_profile" TEXT /* The representative's LinkedIn profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representatives_state_district FOREIGN KEY ("state_district") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representatives_party FOREIGN KEY ("party") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representative receiving the contribution */,
  "interest_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interest group making the contribution */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the contribution */,
  "support_oppose" TEXT /* Indicates if the contribution is in support or opposition */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date when the contribution was made */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., cash, in-kind) */,
  "contribution_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the contribution */,
  "contribution_status" TEXT /* Status of the contribution (e.g., pending, received, rejected) */,
  "audit_trail" TEXT /* Detailed audit trail for the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_interest_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("interest_group_id") REFERENCES interest_groups ("interest_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("representative_id") REFERENCES representatives ("representative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interest_groups" (
  "interest_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the interest group */,
  "focus_area" TEXT /* Primary focus area of the interest group */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the interest group */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the interest group was founded */,
  "legal_status" TEXT /* Legal status of the interest group (e.g., nonprofit, corporation) */,
  "annual_budget" REAL /* Annual budget of the interest group */,
  "number_of_members" INTEGER /* Number of members in the interest group */,
  "website" TEXT /* The interest group's official website */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* The interest group's Twitter handle */,
  "facebook_page" TEXT /* The interest group's Facebook page */,
  "linkedin_profile" TEXT /* The interest group's LinkedIn profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the political party */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the political party was founded */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Ideology of the political party */,
  "website" TEXT /* The political party's official website */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* The political party's Twitter handle */,
  "facebook_page" TEXT /* The political party's Facebook page */,
  "linkedin_profile" TEXT /* The political party's LinkedIn profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "district" TEXT /* District within the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor */,
  "state_website" TEXT /* Official website of the state */,
  "state_twitter_handle" TEXT /* State's Twitter handle */,
  "state_facebook_page" TEXT /* State's Facebook page */,
  "state_linkedIn_profile" TEXT /* State's LinkedIn profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legislative_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legislative action */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representative who took the action */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill associated with the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of legislative action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was taken */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the legislative action */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the legislative action (e.g., passed, failed, pending) */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes in favor of or against the action */,
  "voting_record" TEXT /* Detailed voting record for the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legislative_actions_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legislative_actions_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("representative_id") REFERENCES representatives ("representative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "bill_title" TEXT /* Title of the bill */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bill */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bill (e.g., introduced, passed, vetoed) */,
  "sponsor_party" TEXT /* Political party of the bill's sponsor */,
  "co_sponsors" TEXT /* List of co-sponsors for the bill */,
  "bill_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the bill */,
  "impact_assessment" TEXT /* Assessment of the bill's potential impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, pending) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representative whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action taken during the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("representative_id") REFERENCES representatives ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
